title: Surgeon Vacancy at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital!
